day_0_canon_baseline: Constitutional source-backed world truth emitted under 02_CANON_BASELINE.
session_record: Raw table event capture from campaign play.
candidate_event: Interpreted session event not yet promoted to persistent world status.
validated_world_effect: A candidate event explicitly promoted after applying validation rules.
world_delta: A persistent state change applied to runtime projections, never to baseline canon files.
projected_current_state: The best current runtime view generated from validated deltas and offscreen progression.
branch_state: Branch-local runtime state that must not silently replace mainline.
mainline_state: Approved mainline runtime state generated from validated branch or direct campaign promotion.
